name: Ham in Potato Jackets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter a 9-inch square baking dish.
3. In a medium-sized saucepan, boil the potatoes until tender in water to cover. Drain well and cool.
4. Cut each potato in half and scoop out approximately 2 tbsp of potato from each half; discard or reserve for another use.
5. In a small bowl, combine the butter, sour cream, and mustard and blend well.
6. Place a dab of the butter mixture into the cavity of each potato half.
7. Top with diced ham.
8. Sprinkle with grated cheddar cheese.
9. Bake until the cheese bubbles, about 10 minutes.
10. Serve hot.
